description: Build publication-ready cohort tables from patient-level data: Table 1 baseline demographics (median[IQR], n(%), p-values), efficacy outcomes (ORR/DCR with Clopper-Pearson 95% CI), and CTCAE v5.0 safety, each as CSV plus LaTeX.
rules: read-only — reads one CSV, writes only under record_store
no INPUT_CSV (or empty) falls back to the built-in seeded example cohort
GROUP_COL names the two-arm grouping variable (default 'group')
table1_baseline.csv is always produced; efficacy/safety tables appear when best_response / *_grade columns exist
usage: Set INPUT_CSV (cohort CSV; omit for example data) and optionally GROUP_COL. Output: table1_baseline.csv (+ table1_baseline.tex, and efficacy/safety tables when applicable).
limitation: p-value tests assume a 2-group comparison. Requires pandas/numpy/scipy at run time.
